error.discovery_timeout: Device discovery timed out. Make sure BACnet devices are available on the network.
error.no_devices_found: No BACnet devices were found on the network.
error.device_not_found: The selected device could not be found.

discover.title: Select a BACnet device
discover.description: The following BACnet devices were discovered on your network. Select one to add.

data_description.device_id: The BACnet device to add to Home Assistant.

manual.title: Manual BACnet device configuration
manual.description: Enter the BACnet device ID and network address.

data_description.device_address: The IP address and port of the BACnet device (for example, `192.168.1.100:47808`).

integration_discovery_confirm.title: Discovered BACnet device
integration_discovery_confirm.description: Do you want to add **{device_name}** to Home Assistant?

user.title: Add BACnet hub
user.description: Select the network interface for the BACnet client to listen on.

data_description.interface: The IP address of the network interface to bind to, or select 0.0.0.0 to listen on all interfaces.

manual_interface.title: Enter IP address manually
manual_interface.description: Enter the IP address of the network interface for the BACnet client.

data_description.interface: The IP address to bind the BACnet client to (for example, `192.168.1.50`).

sensors.title: Select objects to monitor
sensors.description: Select which BACnet objects from **{device_name}** you want to add as entities. {object_count} objects were discovered.

data_description.selected_objects: The BACnet objects to monitor from this device.

init.title: Configure BACnet device objects
init.description: Select which BACnet objects from **{device_name}** you want to monitor. {object_count} objects are available.

data_description.selected_objects: The BACnet objects to monitor from this device.

cannot_connect.message: Could not connect to the BACnet network: {error}

device_not_found.message: BACnet device {device_id} was not found on the network: {error}

object_list_error.message: Could not read object list from BACnet device: {error}

no_data.message: No data available from BACnet device
